Welcome

Mad City Power
Cleaning Services

Is Your Home or Office in Need of a Fresh Start?

If you're searching for house cleaning services to keep your space spotless, I'm here to help. At Mad City Power Cleaning Services, I provide reliable and professional cleaning solutions tailored to meet your needs. Serving customers within 30 miles of Madison, WI, I bring three years of experience and an insured approach to every project. Whether you're struggling with hectic schedules or need specialized deep cleanings, my mobile service ensures convenience — offering both residential and commercial cleaning.

What I Offer

I Specialize in the Following Services:

One-Time Cleaning Service

Sometimes you just need a little extra help to get things back on track. My one-time cleaning service is perfect for tackling those stubborn messes or preparing your home for special occasions. Whether it's dusting, scrubbing, or organizing, I'll leave your space refreshed and ready for anything. With this service, you'll save time, reduce stress, and enjoy a cleaner environment without making long-term commitments.

Deep Cleaning Services

Over time, everyday cleaning routines may not be enough to tackle built-up grime in hidden areas. My deep cleaning services go beyond surface-level tidying to address hard-to-reach spaces and neglected corners. From sanitizing kitchens and bathrooms to removing dirt from carpets and upholstery, this thorough approach revitalizes your home. You'll benefit from improved air quality, fewer allergens, and a more welcoming atmosphere overall.

Move-In Cleaning Service

Moving into a new home should feel exciting — not overwhelming because of leftover dirt or debris. My move-in cleaning service eliminates the hassle by giving your new space the attention it needs before you settle in. From wiping down surfaces to vacuuming floors, I'll ensure every room is clean and inviting. This service allows you to focus on starting fresh while feeling confident in a hygienic environment right from day one.

Office Cleaning

A clean office contributes to productivity and creates a great first impression for clients. My office cleaning services are designed to maintain tidy workspaces that inspire focus and professionalism. From desk organization to trash removal, I handle routine maintenance so you can concentrate on business goals. A healthier workplace means happier employees, reduced sick days, and enhanced efficiency.

Other Services

Beyond my core offerings, I provide a full range of cleaning solutions to meet every need. Whether it's regular weekly or monthly maintenance, first-time deep cleans, residential or commercial spaces, I customize each plan to fit your schedule and requirements. No job is too big or too small — my goal is to deliver exceptional results with reliability you can count on every single visit.
